title: Peppy Mediterranean Leek Soup
description: A fluffy and peppery mediterranean soup featuring lemongrass, infused with citrusy flavors for a sugar-free delight.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chopped leeks
ingredients.notes: Use the white and light green parts only

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fresh flat-leaf parsley, chopped (optional garnish)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add leeks and garlic, sauté until softened.
Stir in onion and cook for an additional minute. Mix in lemon zest, juice, dill, and bay leaf. Pour in broth or water.
Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low. Cover and let simmer for 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use a blender to puree half of the soup until smooth; return to pot if prefer chunky consistency.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Reheat gently over medium-low heat. Garnish with parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
